evals.prompt: Use frontend-design-system to update the design system for our app.
evals.expected_output: The alias should activate only because the exact legacy name was requested, then redirect to design-system.
assertions: Explains that the alias exists for compatibility

evals.prompt: Our setup script still expects a folder named frontend-design-system during migration.
evals.expected_output: The alias should remain valid for compatibility and migration workflows.
assertions: Keeps the alias available for exact-name compatibility
Does not present the alias as the default choice for ordinary UI-system work
